Class TemperatureController

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/temperature-logs") public class TemperatureController extends Object
REST controller for temperature logging and monitoring.

Provides endpoints for recording temperature readings and retrieving log history as part of the IK-Mat food safety compliance module. All data is scoped to the authenticated user's organization.

Base path: /api/v1/temperature-logs

    Returns the most recent temperature log entries for the organization.

    Returns the most recent temperature deviation entries for the organization.

  • Constructor Details

    • TemperatureController

      public TemperatureController()

  • Method Details

    • create

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TemperatureLog> create(@RequestParam Long equipmentId, @RequestParam double value, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Records a new temperature reading for a specific piece of equipment.
      Parameters:
      equipmentId - the ID of the equipment being logged
      value - the recorded temperature value in degrees Celsius
      user - the authenticated user recording the reading
      Returns:
      the saved TemperatureLog

    • getAll

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TemperatureLog>> getAll(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Returns all temperature logs for the authenticated user's organization.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      Returns:
      a list of all TemperatureLog entries for the organization

    • getLatest

      @GetMapping("/latest") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TemperatureLog>> getLatest(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user, @RequestParam(defaultValue="10") int limit)
      Returns the most recent temperature log entries for the organization.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      limit - the maximum number of entries to return (default 10)
      Returns:
      a list of the latest TemperatureLog entries

    • getHistory

      @GetMapping("/history") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TemperatureLog>> getHistory(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user, @RequestParam(required=false) Long equipmentId, @RequestParam(required=false) String fromDate, @RequestParam(required=false) String toDate, @RequestParam(required=false) String status)
      Returns filtered temperature log history for the organization.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      equipmentId - optional filter by equipment ID
      fromDate - optional start date filter (ISO format)
      toDate - optional end date filter (ISO format)
      status - optional filter by deviation status (e.g. "DEVIATION")
      Returns:
      a filtered list of TemperatureLog entries

    • getSummary

      @GetMapping("/summary") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Object>> getSummary(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user)
      Returns a dashboard summary of temperature status across all equipment. Used to indicate whether any equipment is currently out of acceptable range.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      Returns:
      a map containing summary data such as deviation counts and equipment status

    • getLatestDeviations

      @GetMapping("/deviations/latest") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TemperatureLog>> getLatestDeviations(@AuthenticationPrincipal User user, @RequestParam(defaultValue="5") int limit)
      Returns the most recent temperature deviation entries for the organization.
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated user
      limit - the maximum number of deviation entries to return (default 5)
      Returns:
      a list of the latest TemperatureLog entries flagged as deviations
